options.name: --file
options.description:
(Default: .env) Location of the .env file. Defaults to .env
file in current working directory.

options.name: --target
options.description:
(Default: Process) Indicates whether the environment variable
should be applied to the current process (default), the
current user, or the machine. Valid values 'Process',
'Machine', or 'User'.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
(Default: false) Loads and parses the .env file, but does not
apply environment variable changes.
